field.description: Path canonique de la dependance (ex brand.creative_zone, profile.verbatim_quotes, spec.visual_identity)

level.description: L1 auto-fill silent, L2 ask-operator gate, L3 degraded with flag

threshold.description: Seuil declencheur (ex 5 pour count, '>=0.7' pour confidence)

auto_pull.description: Required si level=L1, strategie auto-pull (ex dual_path_inline_or_sibling, shopify_products_api, websearch_authoritative)

freshness_ttl_days.description: Required si level=L1, TTL au-dela duquel L1 degrade en L2 gate (defense contre stale data)

options.description: Required si level=L2, 2-4 options binaires pour AskUserQuestion

fallback.description: Required si level=L3, strategie fallback degraded (ex proxy brand_equity_level, last_known_good)

confidence_default.description: Required si level=L3, confidence par defaut quand fallback applique

cross_brand_required.description: Optional v2.37+. Si true, force gate L2 AskUserQuestion pour reads cross-brand sur cette dependance. Bypass scope brand_only default. Doctrine docs/system/brand-isolation-discipline.md
